assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Clearly states 'Upgrade Strategy: Control Plane First, Then Node Pools' and provides the control plane upgrade command before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Order: Coordinating → Data → Master nodes' and provides rationale that coordinating nodes can be upgraded quickly since they don't store data, and emphasizes master nodes are most critical

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: States 'Since you're using regional pd-ssd, the volumes should automatically reattach' and includes monitoring commands for PV status during transitions

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Does not mention Pod Disruption Budgets (PDBs) or setting minAvailable=2 for the 3-master setup to ensure quorum protection

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows '--max-surge=1 --max-unavailable=0' in multiple gcloud commands for data and master node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes specific curl commands to check cluster health and states 'ensure cluster is green' before upgrading master nodes, plus provides monitoring script

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain as a safety measure before the upgrade

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Does not provide kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status, though it includes general pod monitoring commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: First step in preparation includes creating an Elasticsearch snapshot with the command 'curl -X PUT localhost:9200/_snapshot/my-backup/pre-upgrade-snapshot'
